function.name: search_products
function.description: Search the LocallySells tobacco and nicotine product catalog by keyword, brand, or product category. Call this whenever the caller asks whether a product is available, what a price is, or what items exist in a category (e.g. 'do you have Marlboro Reds', 'what vapes do you carry', 'how much are ZYN pouches'). Returns the top matching products with prices.

query.description: The brand, product name, or keyword the caller mentioned, e.g. 'Marlboro Red', 'ZYN', 'Elf Bar', 'blue razz'. Leave empty if the caller only named a category.

category.description: Optional product category to narrow the search. One of: cigarettes, cigars, vape, hookah, nicotine, cbd, accessories.

limit.description: Max number of products to return. Default 20.
